title: Simple Hub
description: This is probably one of the simplest /hub plugins out there!
body:
# How it works 

This plugin gives easy, simple access to a /hub command. All you need is a Multiverse Core world called "hub" and boom! Anyone can now use /hub to join that world.

## Screenshots
![How to create the hub world with Multiverse Core.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2af277eac3bdab7efd51e1caafe343910c54f2.png)
![The /hub command you can use after it's all set up!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd800c417cc95c7137c00a74ec23a134f2de027a.png)

This is truly one of the simplest /hub plugins out there. If you have any questions, please email me at cornmcserver@gmail.com
